# Nitin Gadura — NYC + Long Island Real Estate Agent

> Licensed New York State Real Estate Salesperson (License #10401383405) at Gadura Real Estate LLC. Serving every neighborhood in Queens, Brooklyn, The Bronx, Manhattan, Staten Island, Nassau County, and Suffolk County. Multilingual: English, Hindi, Punjabi, Gujarati, Urdu, Bengali, Guyanese Creole. $100M+ in closed transactions. 500+ families served. 4.9 stars across 57+ verified reviews.

- Suffolk County: Huntington, Smithtown, Stony Brook, Patchogue, Bay Shore, Babylon, and 12 more
- Each guide: real median price, NY closing costs, pricing strategy, full-service vs flat-fee options

**Renting out an apartment (88 landlord guides)** — https://nitingadura.com/rent/
- Same 88 neighborhoods covered with landlord-specific content
- NY-compliant tenant screening (source-of-income protection, credit check, income verification)
- Rent stabilization rules, broker fee disclosure (NYC 2024+ rules)
- Each guide: estimated median rent + landlord process + legal compliance

**Real estate calculators (NY-specific)** — https://nitingadura.com/calculators/
- Mortgage calculator with NY mortgage recording tax built in
- Mansion tax (1–3.9% tiered, $1M+ residential)
- NYC closing costs (buyer + seller breakdown)
- Rent-vs-buy with NY-specific costs
- Affordability calculator
- FHA self-sufficiency (2-4 unit owner-occupant)
- 1031 exchange timeline (45-day + 180-day deadlines)

- Hempstead Turnpike (Indian / Caribbean Nassau spine)

### Manhattan
Tribeca · SoHo · Greenwich Village · West Village · East Village · Lower East Side · Chinatown · Little Italy · Financial District · Battery Park City · Chelsea · Flatiron · Gramercy · Murray Hill · Midtown East · Midtown West · Hell's Kitchen · Upper East Side · Upper West Side · Lincoln Square · Morningside Heights · Harlem · East Harlem · Hamilton Heights · Washington Heights · Inwood · NoHo · NoLita · Two Bridges · Roosevelt Island · Marble Hill.

### Brooklyn
Bay Ridge · Bedford-Stuyvesant · Bensonhurst · Bergen Beach · Boerum Hill · Borough Park · Brighton Beach · Brooklyn Heights · Brownsville · Bushwick · Canarsie · Carroll Gardens · Clinton Hill · Cobble Hill · Coney Island · Crown Heights · Downtown Brooklyn · DUMBO · Dyker Heights · East Flatbush · East New York · Flatbush · Flatlands · Fort Greene · Gowanus · Gravesend · Greenpoint · Kensington · Manhattan Beach · Marine Park · Midwood · Park Slope · Prospect Heights · Prospect Lefferts Gardens · Red Hook · Sheepshead Bay · Sunset Park · Williamsburg · Windsor Terrace.

### Queens
Ozone Park · South Ozone Park · Richmond Hill · South Richmond Hill · Howard Beach · Jamaica · Jamaica Estates · Jamaica Hills · Woodhaven · Glendale · Maspeth · Middle Village · Forest Hills · Rego Park · Kew Gardens · Briarwood · Hollis · Queens Village · Cambria Heights · Springfield Gardens · Rosedale · Laurelton · St. Albans · Rockaway · Far Rockaway · Arverne · Bayside · Whitestone · Flushing · Astoria · Long Island City · Sunnyside · Woodside · Jackson Heights · Elmhurst · Corona · Douglaston · Fresh Meadows · Glen Oaks · Bellerose · Floral Park (Queens) · College Point · Auburndale.

### The Bronx
Riverdale · Fieldston · Spuyten Duyvil · Kingsbridge · Woodlawn · Wakefield · Williamsbridge · Norwood · Bedford Park · Fordham · Mott Haven · Melrose · Hunts Point · Belmont · Soundview · Castle Hill · Parkchester · Westchester Square · Throgs Neck · Country Club · Pelham Bay · Morris Park · Allerton · Eastchester · Co-op City · Baychester · City Island.

### Staten Island
St. George · Stapleton · Tompkinsville · Clifton · Rosebank · South Beach · Dongan Hills · Grant City · New Dorp · Oakwood · Bay Terrace · Great Kills · Eltingville · Annadale · Huguenot · Prince's Bay · Pleasant Plains · Tottenville · Charleston · Rossville · Woodrow · Greenridge · Arden Heights · Bulls Head · New Springville · Travis · Mariners Harbor · West Brighton · Port Richmond · New Brighton · Livingston · Castleton Corners · Westerleigh · Todt Hill · Lighthouse Hill · Emerson Hill · Grymes Hill · Silver Lake.

### Nassau County, Long Island
Garden City · Mineola · Hempstead · West Hempstead · Elmont · Floral Park · Franklin Square · Valley Stream · Lynbrook · Rockville Centre · Baldwin · Freeport · Merrick · Bellmore · Wantagh · Levittown · Hicksville · Westbury · New Hyde Park · Carle Place · East Meadow · Plainview · Bethpage · Massapequa · Massapequa Park · Seaford · Long Beach · Atlantic Beach · Lawrence · Cedarhurst · Hewlett · Woodmere · Five Towns · Roslyn · Albertson · Williston Park · Manhasset · Great Neck · Lake Success · Port Washington · Sands Point · Glen Cove · Sea Cliff · Locust Valley · Oyster Bay · Cold Spring Harbor · Syosset · Jericho · Woodbury · Old Westbury · Brookville · Oceanside · Island Park · East Rockaway.

### Suffolk County, Long Island

## Community Specializations

- **Indo-Caribbean / Guyanese** — Ozone Park, Richmond Hill, South Ozone Park, Howard Beach, Woodhaven, Cambria Heights
- **South Asian / Indian / Punjabi / Sikh** — Floral Park, Bellerose, Hicksville, Jericho, Woodbury, Plainview, New Hyde Park, Glen Oaks, Richmond Hill, Westbury
- **Bengali / Bangladeshi** — Jamaica, Briarwood, Jackson Heights, Ozone Park, Norwood (Bronx), Parkchester, Kensington (Brooklyn), Midwood
- **Hispanic / Spanish-speaking** — Corona, Elmhurst, Jackson Heights, Sunset Park, Bushwick, Bay Shore, Brentwood, Patchogue, Huntington Station
- **Caribbean / Haitian / Jamaican / Trinidadian** — Canarsie, Flatbush, East Flatbush, Crown Heights, Cambria Heights, Springfield Gardens, Laurelton, Rosedale, Wakefield (Bronx)
- **Russian / Ukrainian** — Brighton Beach, Sheepshead Bay, Coney Island, Manhattan Beach, Bensonhurst, Forest Hills, Rego Park
- **Bukharian Jewish** — Forest Hills, Rego Park, Kew Gardens
- **Orthodox / Hasidic Jewish** — Borough Park, Crown Heights, Williamsburg, Midwood, Far Rockaway, Five Towns
- **Italian** — Howard Beach, Bensonhurst, Dyker Heights, Marine Park, Throgs Neck, Bay Ridge, most of Staten Island
- **Korean** — Murray Hill (Queens), Bayside, Douglaston, Whitestone, Manhasset, Great Neck, Roslyn, Syosset, Commack
- **Chinese** — Flushing, Sunset Park, Bensonhurst, Elmhurst, Bath Beach, Stony Brook
- **Persian / Iranian Jewish** — Great Neck, Roslyn, Manhasset, Lake Success, Woodbury

## Services

- Buyer representation (FHA, conventional, SONYMA, HomeReady, VA, jumbo)
- Seller representation (full-service and flat-fee options)
- First-time homebuyer guidance
- Multi-family / 2-family / 3-family investment property analysis
- Co-op board package preparation
- Condo and condop transactions
- 1031 exchange representation
- New construction representation
- Inherited property sales (NY Surrogate Court coordination)
- Divorce home sales
- Senior downsizing
- Short sales
- Free Comparative Market Analysis (CMA)
- Free home valuation
